description_long: This is a small, single-engine light airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a bubble canopy that is currently open, revealing a two-seat cockpit with side-by-side seating. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all of which are fixed and exposed. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a classic tailplane. The exterior is primarily white with blue accents along the fuselage and wingtips, and a small emblem is visible on the tail fin.
description: A small, white low-wing light airplane with a bubble canopy, nose-mounted propeller, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open bubble canopy, cockpit interior, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the straight, low-mounted wings and the symmetrical tailplane.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open canopy, propeller, and landing gear clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose-mounted propeller, cockpit canopy, and the tricycle landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a bubble canopy and side-by-side seating for two.
